A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent identified only four track_ids via simple title-based LIKE searches (4233, 10838, 12954, 15158) and summed Apple Music Canada revenue for those (yielding 601.44), missing additional duplicates of Beyoncé’s “Get Me Bodied” needed for complete entity resolution, as shown by the trace queries and resulting undercount.
B. Failure modes encountered:

FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
